items.title: pip & requirements.txt
items.description: A fully pinned, hashed requirements.txt (e.g. from pip-compile) is a lockfile in practice.

items.title: Poetry
items.description: poetry.lock is a first-class lockfile produced by Poetry's resolver.

items.title: Conda
items.description: environment.yml (and conda-lock) provide the reproducibility layer for conda environments.
